Subject: Tech E&O / Cyber quote — Acme Robotics Ltd

Hi,

Insured: Acme Robotics Ltd (Companies House no. 09876543)
Business: SaaS platform for warehouse automation
Annual revenue: £2,500,000
Years trading: 6
Prior claims: none
Customer records held: approx 500,000
Requested limit: £1,000,000

Jane — Brightside Brokers
